quoteLast: —There has been little change in the President’s   condition since the noon bulletin was issued. The frequency of his   pulse is now the same as then. His temperature has risen somewhat,   but it is not so high as yesterday evening. No unfavorable change   has been observed in the condition of the wound. He has taken by the   mouth a sufficient supply of liquid food. Pulse, 112; temperature,   99.8; respiration, 19.”
